plugins.name: e2e-skills
plugins.description: Four E2E skills for Playwright, Cypress, and Puppeteer: generate tests from scratch with live browser exploration and Plan Mode approval; audit existing specs against 11 anti-patterns (name-assertion mismatch, missing Then, error swallowing, always-passing assertions, missing assertions, bypass patterns, raw DOM queries, focused test leak, hard-coded sleeps, flaky selectors, YAGNI) with P0/P1/P2 severity; debug failed Playwright tests from playwright-report/; debug failed Cypress tests from cypress/reports/.
